title: brain source trust show — --json success output
description: Show a source's current trust state and (optionally) its trust-change history. Read-only; the privileged promote/revoke transitions are separate Phase-4 commands.

normalizedContentHash.description: sha256 of the normalized rendition — the identity trust is bound to.

contentId.description: The immutable contentId the query resolved to (trust is bound to this + the reviewed rendition, never the mutable sourceId/active-rendition alias).

effectiveTrustLevel.description: The trust level in effect NOW. Equals the reviewed rendition's promoted level while the active rendition still matches the reviewed one; forced to `untrusted` whenever trust is suspended (active-rendition drift, or a fail-closed trust-ledger gap).

reviewedTrustLevel.description: The level the reviewed rendition was promoted to (the persisted binding). Present iff a promotion exists; may exceed effectiveTrustLevel when suspended.

suspended.description: True when a previously reviewed rendition's trust is suspended because the active rendition drifted (changed normalizedContentHash) or the trust ledger is in a fail-closed state — content re-taints to untrusted until re-promotion or proven equivalence.

suspensionReason.description: Why trust is suspended/absent (present iff suspended is true).

reviewedRendition.description: The (renditionId, normalizedContentHash) pair the trust was reviewed + promoted against. Absent when the content was never promoted.

activeRendition.description: The content's current active rendition. When its normalizedContentHash differs from reviewedRendition's, trust is suspended.

x-atlas-contract.summary: Show a source's trust state + history.
prohibitedEffects: no trust mutation (use privileged source trust promote/revoke)

errorCodes.when: the handle is not a valid contentId/renditionId
no capture resolves for the handle
